no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: >
  The prompt_sha schema/resolver/test changes are implemented in
  cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql,
  cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go,
  cli/internal/server/graphql/generated.go, and
  cli/internal/server/graphql/efficacy_sessions_test.go, but the
  normal GraphQL package build is already blocked by pre-existing
  duplicate resolver implementations in cli/internal/server/graphql/
  resolver.go and the split resolver files (for example
  resolver_feat008.go and resolver_artifacts_mutation.go). Running
  `go test ./internal/server/graphql -count=1` fails before the new
  promptSha test can execute. The agent package verification does
  pass (`go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestExecuteBeadInstructionsLoadBearingGuardrails|TestExecuteBeadInstructionsHarnessSelector|TestExecuteBeadInstructionsRenderedInvariants|TestExecuteBeadInstructionsMissingGoverningGate|TestExecuteBeadInstructionsSizeFloor|TestPromptSizeReport|TestPromptSHA_DeterministicAcrossRenders' -count=1`).
  A follow-up needs a repo-wide resolver deduplication or build-tag
  cleanup so the GraphQL package can compile normally under the
  standard test command.
